operator_log.detail: Command authority acquired ahead of pre-conditioning start. Supervisor node confirmed.
Facility hold issued: heater bank 2 thermocouple (TC-H2) open-circuit fault. Chamber ramp suspended at +12 °C. Ref. ANOM-FAT-003.
Marker placed at TC-H2 replacement point. Hold duration: 22 min 15 s.
Hold cleared. Ramp resumed. DUT telemetry continuous throughout hold; no re-soak required.
Hot-operational functional gate requested for cycle 2. Gate evaluation dispatched to supervisor.
ANOM-FAT-003 acknowledged and closed. TCR-FAT-2026-007 filed. Lease retained for end-of-campaign sign-off.
